CREATE TABLE test_mapAdd1 (key UInt8, value Int64) ENGINE = Memory;
CREATE TABLE test_mapAdd2 (key1 UInt8, value1 Int64, key2 UInt8, value2 Int64) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT mapAdd(([key1, key2], [value1, value2])) FROM test_mapAdd2;
CREATE TABLE test_mapAdd3 (keys Array(UInt8), values Array(UInt64)) ENGINE = Memory;
CREATE TABLE test_mapAdd4 (k1 Array(UInt8), v1 Array(Int64), k2 Array(UInt8), v2 Array(Int64)) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT mapAdd((k1, v1), (k2, v2)) FROM test_mapAdd4;
SELECT mapAdd(([toUInt8(1), toUInt8(2)], [1, 2]), ([toUInt8(1), toUInt8(2)], [3, 4])) as res, toTypeName(res) as type;
CREATE TABLE test_mapAdd5 (a Array(UInt8), b Array(Float64)) ENGINE = Memory;
CREATE TABLE test_mapAdd6 (key Array(UInt8), value Array(Int64)) ENGINE = Memory;
CREATE TABLE test_mapAdd7 (key1 Array(UInt8), value1 Array(UInt64), key2 Array(UInt8), value2 Array(Float64)) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT mapAdd((key1, value1), (key2, value2)) FROM test_mapAdd7;
